report_metadata.step_description: NOTE: Only process documents with route_to_step=4 (document_category="Design Brief"). TAL spreadsheet files and Site Plan files must be excluded. Using the processing plan from Step 2, filter the document list to only those documents that meet the search context of the 'Extract Information from Design Brief' process (proc-extract-design-brief-info). A document qualifies if its content matches the search context criteria: it must contain a 'Method of Supply Requirement' section and/or a 'Determination of Funding Requirements' section, or be an architectural, services, or town planning report. Do not process any document that does not meet this content criteria, even if it was tagged as 'Design Brief' in Step 2 — and do not process any Site Plan or drawing document. For each qualifying document, extract structured information using proc-extract-design-brief-info as the extraction guide. Extract supply requirements (HV, LV, Street Lighting, Earthing, Easements, Substation) and funding determination items.
report_metadata.validation_criteria: Must return a JSON object with 'total_files' and 'extractions' array containing only documents whose content matches the proc-extract-design-brief-info search context (i.e. documents containing a Method of Supply or Determination of Funding Requirements section). Must not include Site Plan, drawing, or reticulation documents. Each extraction must include 'filename', 'total_sections', 'relevant_sections', 'page_size', 'requires_chunking', 'chunk_strategy', 'estimated_chunks', and 'step_extraction' with at least one of: hv, lv, sl, earthing, easements, substation, funding_items. The 'page_size' field must be one of: 'A4', 'A3', 'A2', 'A1', 'A0', or 'large-format'. When 'requires_chunking' is true, 'chunk_strategy' must be 'quadrant-split' or 'page-split' and 'estimated_chunks' must be greater than 1.

## STEP NAME
Extract Design Brief Information

## STEP DESCRIPTION
NOTE: Only process documents with route_to_step=4 (document_category="Design Brief"). TAL spreadsheet files and Site Plan files must be excluded. Using the processing plan from Step 2, filter the document list to only those documents that meet the search context of the 'Extract Information from Design Brief' process (proc-extract-design-brief-info). A document qualifies if its content matches the search context criteria: it must contain a 'Method of Supply Requirement' section and/or a 'Determination of Funding Requirements' section, or be an architectural, services, or town planning report. Do not process any document that does not meet this content criteria, even if it was tagged as 'Design Brief' in Step 2 — and do not process any Site Plan or drawing document. For each qualifying document, extract structured information using proc-extract-design-brief-info as the extraction guide. Extract supply requirements (HV, LV, Street Lighting, Earthing, Easements, Substation) and funding determination items.

• The owner now requires a load of 50amps per phase.

• Replace existing Pole 829583 with a 12.5m/12kN wood Pole 1.
• Install a 200kVA, 3 Phase Semi Rural Substation on the new 12.5m/12kN Pole 1, with Separate
Earthing.
LV Connection:
• Install a Private Pillar 1 at the base of Pole 1.
• Install LV UGOH down Pole 1 to Private Pillar 1.

• Decommission and remove Pole Sub 31174.
• Remove Pole 2(with Ground Stay) and Pole 3.
